# OnePerfectSlice Documentation

> OnePerfectSlice analyzes sales conversations with AI to surface structured insights, evidence, and scorecards.

## Docs
- [Overview](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/)
- [Quickstart](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/quickstart)
- [Slices](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/product/slices)
- [Scorecards](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/product/scorecards)
- [Posts](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/product/posts)
- [HubSpot Integration](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/integrations/hubspot)

## API Reference
- [Getting Started](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/introduction)
- [Authentication](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/authentication)
- [Endpoints](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/endpoints)
- [Rate Limiting](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/rate-limiting)
- [Pagination](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/pagination)
- [Errors](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/errors)
- [Data Models](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/data-models)
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/api/openapi.yaml)

## MCP Server
- [Overview](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/mcp/overview)
- [Claude Code Setup](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/mcp/claude-code)
- [Claude Desktop Setup](https://oneperfectslice.mintlify.app/mcp/claude-desktop)
